question: What are the names of clients who have ordered Pride and Prejudice?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Client.Name FROM Client JOIN Orders ON Client.IdClient = Orders.IdClient JOIN Books_Order ON Orders.IdOrder = Books_Order.IdOrder JOIN Book ON Books_Order.ISBN = Book.ISBN WHERE Book.Title = 'Pride and Prejudice';

back_translation.intent: 获取所有订购了《Pride and Prejudice》的客户名称

semantic.reason: 目标表存在差异，SQL描述中包含Books_Order表而原始问题未提及，可能暗示关联关系不明确或存在冗余表引用
